visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a view of a snow-capped Mount Fuji under a cloudy sky. A hand enters from the bottom left, fingers spread against the landscape. (2) Interior shot of a spacious wooden living room; a man in a plaid shirt sits on a tan leather sofa. Wood paneling covers the walls and floor, creating a warm atmosphere. (3) A wide window view shows a wooden deck and Mount Fuji in the distance. A hand reaches out toward the window, emphasizing the view. (4) A white and grey dartboard hangs on a wooden wall. A hand reaches toward it. (5) Bathroom interior with a white modern sink and a large mirror reflecting the person holding the camera. (6) A clean, white bathroom featuring a small bathtub and shower head. A mirror reflects the camera operator. (7) A toilet room with light wood walls and a modern white bidet-style toilet. (8) View from a wooden balcony overlooking a residential area with Mount Fuji in the background. A fire extinguisher is visible near the balcony door. (9) A bedroom with two single beds neatly made with grey blankets. Warm indoor lighting illuminates the wooden walls. (10) Exterior of a dark grey trailer house with a small deck and outdoor seating on a sunny day. (11) A bright yellow trailer house with a red CHUMS logo and a penguin graphic is shown. (12) Landscape view of a valley with houses and Mount Fuji under a blue sky. (13) A young woman in a white hoodie and blue skirt stands on a lawn, smiling with her arms outstretched. (14) Two children in pajamas are rolling and playing on a green lawn with wooden picnic tables nearby. (15) A circular room with numerous small, illuminated aquariums built into the walls. People walk through the center. (16) Close-up of translucent jellyfish floating in a tall, cylindrical tank with purple/blue backlighting. (17) A walkthrough tunnel decorated with dense purple and blue fairy lights. Figures walk in the distance. (18) Inside a cabin, a man in a black jacket carries a large white bin of food towards a dining table. (19) Close-up of two large food trays containing raw meat for hotpot, sashimi, and small appetizers. (20) A child-friendly meal set including a burger steak, fries, and a scoop of rice is shown on a dark table. (21) A young girl in a lavender sweater uses chopsticks to eat from a bowl. A hotpot sits on the table. (22) Night scene showing the dark silhouette of Mount Fuji against a deep blue sky with streetlights and building lights in the foreground.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 渡假園區. (2) [Variety]: 大客廳. (3) [Variety]: 大面窗. (4) [Variety]: 遊戲. (5) [Variety]: 洗手. (6) [Variety]: 洗身體. (7) [Variety]: 洗屁屁. (8) [Variety]: 富士山. (9) [Variety]: 兩張床. (10) [Variety]: 還有車屋. (11) [Variety]: 企鵝聯名車屋. (12) [Variety]: 又是富士山. (13) [Variety]: 可以拍照. (14) [Variety]: 可以打滾. (15) [Variety]: 免費看魚. (16) [Variety]: 水母漂. (17) [Variety]: 晚上會開燈. (18) [Variety]: 含晚餐. (19) [Variety]: 二大二小. (20) [Variety]: 一晚只要. (21) [Slogan]: 8800. (22) [Logo]: 時之栖 OUTDOOR HILL VILLAGE.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A man on the couch, a woman in the hoodie, two kids rolling on the grass, and a girl eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A variety of individuals including a man in a plaid shirt, a woman in a white hoodie/blue skirt, and two children in pajamas.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features multiple backgrounds including the interior of a cozy wooden resort cabin, exterior shots of trailer houses, panoramic views of Mount Fuji, an aquarium setting, and a light-up tunnel at night.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio consists of a bright, upbeat acoustic-pop background track. It features a steady 4/4 drum beat and rhythmic acoustic guitar strumming. There are no spoken vocals or narration. (2) The BGM continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent energy level and tempo throughout the montage. (3) The track maintains its positive and energetic tone until the video ends, with no distinct sound effects or environmental noise layers present.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Feature 3 -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote the various facilities and scenic attractions of the Outdoor Hill Village resort, highlighting its family-friendly environment, beautiful views of Mount Fuji, and included amenities like dinner.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Displaying the brand logo 'CHUMS' and providing a specific price point '8800' for a stay at the resort.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses rapid cuts and vibrant text overlays to create an engaging travel vlog style typical of social media platforms.
